feed.title: Google Cloud: Cloud Hub
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Cloud Hub

entry.content:
Cost optimization with Gemini Cloud Assist provides the following additional features:

  • In the Gemini Cloud Assist chat panel, get an explanation for cost changes for supported resources.
  • On the Optimization page in Cloud Hub, get insights about recent cost changes and related changes in resource usage.

For more information, see Optimize costs with Gemini assistance.
entry.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist now offers enhanced cost optimization features. You can get explanations for cost changes directly in the chat panel and detailed insights on the Optimization page, linking cost changes to resource usage. This helps you better understand and manage your cloud spending.
entry.title: Feature: Gemini Cloud Assist cost insights

entry.content: App Topology is in Preview. App Topology lets you query data about your resources and applications from multiple sources, and then view the correlated data as a topology graph.
entry.summary: App Topology is now available in Preview. This feature allows you to query and visualize correlated data from multiple resource and application sources as a topology graph.
entry.title: Feature: App Topology Now in Preview

entry.content: The Deployments page supports viewing recent application deployments to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) and Cloud Run.
entry.summary: The Deployments page now allows you to see recent application deployments to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) and Cloud Run. This feature provides a consolidated view of your application's deployment history on these platforms.
entry.title: Feature: View Recent Application Deployments

entry.content: The Maintenance page supports viewing maintenance activities for App Hub applications that you have created in App Hub or Application Design Center. This feature is in Preview.
entry.summary: The Maintenance page in App Hub now allows you to view maintenance activities for your applications. This feature, currently in Preview, provides insights into upcoming and ongoing maintenance for applications created in App Hub or Application Design Center.
entry.title: Feature: Maintenance page now available

entry.content: Security & compliance in Cloud Hub is in Preview.
entry.summary: Security and compliance features for Cloud Hub are now available in preview. This allows users to explore and test enhanced security and compliance capabilities within the platform before general availability.
entry.title: Feature: Security and compliance in Cloud Hub now in preview

entry.summary: The Cloud Hub platform has reached general availability, offering a new way to manage your cloud resources. Explore its capabilities and streamline your operations today.
entry.title: Announcement: Cloud Hub is Now Generally Available

entry.content: You can now view Active Assist cost optimization recommendations in Cloud Hub is now in Preview.
entry.summary: Cloud cost optimization recommendations are now available for preview in Cloud Hub.
entry.title: Feature: Active Assist cost optimization recommendations available in Cloud Hub

entry.content: All scheduled and started maintenance activities are now listed together on the Maintenance page. You can use the more_vert Settings menu for scheduled activities that you can modify.
entry.summary: All scheduled and started maintenance activities are now consolidated on the Maintenance page. Use the Settings menu for modifiable scheduled activities.
entry.title: Changed: Maintenance Updates
